title: euphorbia esculenta
intro: Euphorbia esculenta, also known as the potato bush or wild potato, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
